primary_workflow: AI-generated recommendation in -> AI Trust Decision Record out
first_target_workflow: AI-generated security, compliance, and vendor-risk recommendations
current_priority: Build the AI Trust Decision Record workflow before dashboards, TrustMap, broad governance, runtime agents, or generic trust scores.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs unless explicitly approved. Prefer implementing the first ATDR workflow inside Evidence, Proof Pack, or a clearly labeled workflow pane.
required_atdr_workflow_steps: Export a defensible AI Trust Decision Record

deprioritized_but_preserved.trustmap: Deferred. Preserve files and docs. Do not continue TrustMap engineering unless explicitly redirected.
deprioritized_but_preserved.architecture_model_library_expansion: Deferred unless needed directly for ATDR.

prototype_boundary: Static advisory prototype. Do not claim autonomous approval, live compliance certification, live vendor approval, legal determination, audit opinion, CMMC certification, production enforcement, live evidence retrieval, live internet verification, or backend persistence.
core_doctrine: Do not ask only, 'Do we trust the AI?' Ask, 'Which parts of the AI recommendation can be trusted, at what confidence level, based on what evidence, with what risk if wrong, and what human decision is required?'
qa_priority_for_next_build: User can paste an AI recommendation
System maps user-provided evidence to claims
System assigns confidence band with reasons
System flags human review when required
System exports a structured AI Trust Decision Record
TrustMap is not the main workflow
